Description.SourceString:
Sometimes you just want a way to make everyone around you cry. Onions have always served this purpose, and I often bring one with me to slice into at social gatherings when I feel everyone is being just a little too happy.

With these seeds, you can avoid scavenging for onions across the dangerous plains and instead produce a steady supply with them to torment your friends and family. Or you could eat them, I guess, if you’re weird.
